where.if: AND ( d.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT d.diary_id , d.content , d.one_line_comment , d.image_url , d.created_at , d.status , d.is_public , d.is_popular , IF(ga.attendance_id IS NOT NULL, 1, 0) AS isVerified , ga.verified_at AS verifiedAt , d.member_id , m.nickname AS memberName , m.email AS memberEmail , m.profile_image AS profileImage , g.game_date , g.status AS gameStatus , g.cancel_reason AS cancelReason , g.score_home AS scoreHome , g.score_away AS scoreAway , t1.name_kr AS homeTeamName , t2.name_kr AS awayTeamName , d.snapshot_team_code AS snapshotTeamCode , CASE WHEN d.snapshot_team_code NOT IN (g.home_team_code, g.away_team_code) THEN 'NONE' WHEN g.winning_team = d.snapshot_team_code THEN 'WIN' WHEN g.winning_team = 'DRAW' THEN 'DRAW' WHEN g.winning_team IS NOT NULL THEN 'LOSE' ELSE 'NONE' END AS gameResult , d.pred_score_home AS predScoreHome , d.pred_score_away AS predScoreAway FROM diaries d JOIN members m ON d.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN games g ON d.game_id = g.game_id LEFT JOIN teams t1 ON g.home_team_code = t1.team_code LEFT JOIN teams t2 ON g.away_team_code = t2.team_code LEFT JOIN game_attendances ga ON d.member_id = ga.member_id AND d.game_id = ga.game_id
ORDER BY d.created_at DESC LIMIT #{amount} OFFSET ${(pageNum - 1) * amount}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM diaries d JOIN members m ON d.member_id = m.member_id
mapper.update: UPDATE diaries SET status = 'BLIND', updated_at = NOW() WHERE diary_id = #{diaryId}
UPDATE diaries SET status = 'DELETED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE diary_id = #{diaryId}
mapper.select:
SELECT d.diary_id, d.member_id, d.one_line_comment, g.game_date, g.game_time, g.status AS gameStatus, g.cancel_reason AS cancelReason,
-- 구장 짧은 이름 + 풀네임 조합 (예: 잠실 (서울종합운동장 야구장)) CASE WHEN s.short_name IS NOT NULL AND s.short_name != s.name THEN CONCAT(s.short_name, ' (', s.name, ')') ELSE s.name END AS stadiumName,
g.score_home AS scoreHome, g.score_away AS scoreAway, t1.name_kr AS homeTeamName, t2.name_kr AS awayTeamName,
CASE WHEN d.snapshot_team_code NOT IN (g.home_team_code, g.away_team_code) THEN 'NONE' WHEN g.winning_team = d.snapshot_team_code THEN 'WIN' WHEN g.winning_team = 'DRAW' THEN 'DRAW' WHEN g.winning_team IS NOT NULL THEN 'LOSE' ELSE 'NONE' END AS gameResult,
-- [추가] 인증 상태 컬럼 (DiaryVO 매핑용) IF(ga.attendance_id IS NOT NULL, 1, 0) AS isVerified, ga.verified_at AS verifiedAt
FROM diaries d INNER JOIN games g ON d.game_id = g.game_id INNER JOIN stadiums s ON g.stadium_id = s.stadium_id LEFT JOIN teams t1 ON g.home_team_code = t1.team_code LEFT JOIN teams t2 ON g.away_team_code = t2.team_code -- [추가] 직관 인증 테이블 조인 LEFT JOIN game_attendances ga ON d.member_id = ga.member_id AND d.game_id = ga.game_id WHERE d.member_id = #{memberId} -- [수정] d.is_verified = 1 대신 인증 테이블 데이터 존재 여부 검사 AND ga.attendance_id IS NOT NULL AND g.status = 'FINISHED' AND d.status = 'COMPLETED' AND g.game_type IN ('REGULAR', 'POST', 'EXHIBITION') ORDER BY g.game_date DESC, g.game_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM diaries WHERE is_popular = 'Y' AND is_public = 'PUBLIC' AND status = 'COMPLETED'
mapper.update: UPDATE diaries SET is_popular = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE diary_id = #{diaryId}
